task_completion.description: Log in to the student information system using the provided administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logging in with username 'admin' or the OpenSIS dashboard indicating an active administrator session.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the attendance codes configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS interface for managing or setting up Attendance Codes.

task_completion.description: Create an attendance code titled 'Half Day' with the short name 'HD'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out or a saved record in the attendance codes list showing the Title as 'Half Day' and Short Name as 'HD'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Half Day' code with Type 'Official', State Code 'HD', and Default set to 'No'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration for 'Half Day' explicitly shows the Type selected as 'Official', the State Code entered as 'HD', and the Default option set to 'No' (or left unchecked).

task_completion.description: Create an attendance code titled 'Virtual Attendance' with the short name 'VA'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out or a saved record in the attendance codes list showing the Title as 'Virtual Attendance' and Short Name as 'VA'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Virtual Attendance' code with Type 'Official', State Code 'VA', and Default set to 'No'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration for 'Virtual Attendance' explicitly shows the Type selected as 'Official', the State Code entered as 'VA', and the Default option set to 'No' (or left unchecked).

integrity.description: The agent must use the web-based graphical user interface (GUI) of the student information system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the OpenSIS application, not a terminal executing SQL commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent must actually save or submit the new attendance codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a success message, the codes appearing in the saved list view, or the 'Save'/'Submit' button being clicked, rather than just abandoning a filled-out form.

integrity.description: The agent must not simply type the target values into a text editor or dummy page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the actual OpenSIS attendance code configuration forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The system is OpenSIS v9.2. The task requires creating two specific attendance codes. Code 1: Title: 'Half Day', Short Name: 'HD', Type: 'Official', State Code: 'HD', Default: No (or unchecked). Code 2: Title: 'Virtual Attendance', Short Name: 'VA', Type: 'Official', State Code: 'VA', Default: No (or unchecked). The credentials to be used are admin / Admin@123.
